signals.headline: Russia-Ukraine Easter Ceasefire (32 hours, Apr 11-12, 2026) Confirmed in Force | NO (Temporary Holiday Pause, Not Perman
signals.raw:
Russia-Ukraine Easter Ceasefire (32 hours, Apr 11-12, 2026) Confirmed in Force | NO (Temporary Holiday Pause, Not Permanent) | HIGH confidence** [2][4]

Russia's Defense Ministry announced a 32-hour ceasefire with Ukraine starting 4pm Moscow time (1300 GMT) on April 11, 2026, until end of April 12, tied to Orthodox Easter; Zelenskyy responded with a "mirror manner" pledge, expressing skepticism.[2

signals.headline: Ethereum Foundation Locks 70,000 ETH ($143M) in Staking | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Foundation Locks 70,000 ETH ($143M) in Staking | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Ethereum Foundation has confirmed staking 70,000 ETH worth $143 million, halting years of token sales that pressured prices and signaling a shift to earning yields as the network's largest holder.[3]  
This mid-April 2026 development, with ETH trading near $2,332 after a recovery from February lows, strengthens
